author: RulinShao
name: Depth Recurrence + Banked Muon + Tuned Pre-Quant TTT
blurb: 3-layer depth recurrence (layers 3,4,5, start=3000) + parameter-banked Parallel Muon + Pre-quant AdamW TTT (22ep lr=2.5e-4). warmdown_frac=0.667. SP8192, SDClip GPTQ int6 + brotli. H200 3-seed: 1.0583 BPB. H100 3-seed: 1.0626 BPB.
technique_summary: Depth Recurrence (3,4,5 start=3000) + Banked Muon + TTT 22ep lr=2.5e-4 + warmdown_frac=0.667 + SP8192
